name: vendor.myndhyve.ads-policy
description: MyndHyve ads.policy.check — built-in policy text-rule scanner. Detects claims (guarantees, income, superlatives), trademark mentions, prohibited content (before/after, deceptive urgency), discriminatory targeting. Caller-supplied placement text-limits + trust-guardrail results for fuller coverage; standalone for text-rule-only checks.
author: MyndHyve

nodes.label: Run Ad Policy Check
nodes.description: Scan ad copy against 7 built-in policy text rules (claims-guarantee, claims-income, claims-superlative, trademark-competitor, prohibited-before-after, prohibited-urgency-scam, targeting-discrimination). Pattern + keyword matching with severity-driven fail/warning classification. Optional inputs.placementTextLimits adds placement-aware text-length validation. Optional inputs.trustGuardrailChecks merges caller-supplied trust-guardrail results.
